hero.name: Irwan Adinata
hero.subtitle: I craft modern, performant web applications from intuitive frontends to robust backends.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A little background
about.description: I am a dedicated and enthusiastic web developer with experience in using JavaScript and TypeScript programming language and frameworks such as React JS, Next JS, and Express JS. I have a strong interest in creating responsive, efficient, and user-friendly web applications. With a solid background in both front-end and back-end development, I am committed to continuous learning and growth in the technology industry.
about.description2: Outside of coding, I dedicate my time to exploring new technologies and staying ahead of industry trends. I believe continuous learning is the foundation of delivering high-quality, reliable software.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? I'd love to hear from you. Send me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
